action.reasoning: Observation: Starting from scratch, iteration 0 of 30, ~3 hours budget. Need to establish a working baseline pipeline ASAP. Analysis: This is METR-LA spatiotemporal forecasting. A simple STGCN (spatial graph conv + temporal 1D conv) with z-score normalization is a solid, fast-to-train baseline. Decision: Write model.py, train.py, predict.py. Train for only 2 epochs to validate pipeline and measure iteration time, then immediately submit eval.
